attempts.insight: **This is the load-bearing finding of the iter.** The blueprint claim that `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_obj_kaehler` makes `M_U := (relativeDifferentialsPresheaf f).presheaf.obj (op V‚āÄ)` 'definitionally equal' to `ő©[őď(X,V‚āÄ)‚ĀĄőď(S,U‚āÄ)]` is WRONG: the project-local `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_obj_kaehler` identifies `M_U` with `CommRingCat.KaehlerDifferential (ŌÜ'.app (op V‚āÄ))` where the source of `ŌÜ'` is `((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (op V‚āÄ)` ‚ÄĒ i.e. the inverse-image-presheaf at `V‚āÄ`, which is `colim_{f V‚āÄ ‚äÜ W ‚äÜ S} S.presheaf.obj W`, NOT `őď(S, U‚āÄ)`. The colimit-source ring is strictly larger than the chart-source ring in general. The bridge is a real `LinearEquiv` (or `RingEquiv`-then-`Module.Free.of_ringEquiv`), not a `rfl`.
